activities.name: Fun Jumping
activities.description: Open sky, crew you know. Show up and jump.

activities.name: Canopy Coaching
activities.description: One-on-one and small group coaching under canopy. Work on accuracy, swooping, and canopy control with experienced coaches.

activities.name: Freefly Coaching
activities.description: Head-down, sit-flying, and hybrid work with experienced coaches.

activities.name: Demo Jumps
activities.description: Jumpers carry large custom flags and banners into events and stadiums. We work with New Zealand's leading event producers, with an active partnership through Switch It Up Events. Recent openings include Auckland FC at Go Media Stadium, the Canterbury A&P Show, and Magicland Festival.

activities.name: AFF
activities.description: Accelerated Freefall: learn to skydive. Launching Spring 2026.
